Annotation.String: Complex type item which represents Equivalence Network Node.
MPMLink representation of a Split Alternate
Represents Upstream Part, Downstream Part, Equivalence Link and Usage Link between them (if exists)
Represents the definition for the Paste As New Part transformation
Represents the definition for the Paste As New Branch transformation
Property is updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Coproduce Related to Usage Parts link
Represents the definition for the New Downstream Part transformation
Represents the definition for the New Downstream Branch transformation
Represents the definition for the transformation operation
Property is only updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Property is updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Represents the definition for the New Downstream Branch transformation
Plant Data Related to Department Data link
Property is only updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Property is only updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Property is only updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Property is updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Coproduce Related to Secondary Parts link
EquivalenceLinkAssociation is a entity to store information used for create/remove link
Represents the input for the New Downstream Branch and general for other objects
EquivalenceUsageAssociation is a entity to store path both to upstream and downstream root and navigation to Parts and Nav Criteria
Complex type item which represents Discrepancy
Represents Upstream Part, Downstream Part and Equivalence Link between them (if exists)
Part Related to Plant Data link
Represents the definition for the Paste As New Branch transformation
Property is updateable via UpdateCommonProperties action
Complex type which represents existing downstream obiects for given branch attributes and upstream object
Complex type list item which represents Part and associated ExtendedDatas.
Complex type which represents UpstreamPart related query params to GetExistingDownstreamObjects endpoint
Complex type list item which represents Part and associated RawMaterials.
Complex type item which represents Equivalence Network Node.
Complex type list item which represents Plant and associated DepartmentDatas.
Complex type list item which represents Part and associated MadeFromSets.
Complex type which represents branch attributes in Bom Transformer
Complex type item which represents Assemble parameters.
Complex type list item which represents Part and associated Coproduces.
Get ExtendedDatas for Parts using the Navigation Criteria passed in the navigationCriteria parameter.
Get ExtendedDatas for Parts. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Get DepartmentDatas for Parts using the Navigation Criteria passed in the navigationCriteria parameter.
Get DepartmentDatas for Parts. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Get DepartmentDatas for Plant using the Navigation Criteria passed in the navigationCriteria parameter.
Get DepartmentDatas for Plant. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Create plant data for particular part for certain change id.
Create department data for particular part for certain change id.
Create department data for particular plant for certain change id.
Get Raw Materials for Parts. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Get Raw Materials for Parts using the Navigation Criteria passed in the navigationCriteria parameter

Delete Single or Multiple Associations between Parts and Department Data

Add Secondary Parts for CoProduce using the Navigation Criteria passed in the NavigationCriteria parameter.
Removes Secondary Parts from CoProduce. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Removes Secondary Parts from CoProduce. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Create Single or Multiple Associations between Parts/MadeFromSet and MadeFromParts.
Update CoProduce Structure. If NavigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.
Update CoProduce Structure. If NavigationCriteria is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria will be used.
Get Coproduces' data. If navigationCriteriaId is passed as a parameter, the Navigation Criteria with the given ID will be used.

Get Coproduce for Parts using the Navigation Criteria passed in the NavigationCriteria parameter.

Update to Current Upstream Equivalent Objects action
Detects discrepancies between upstream and downstream
CreateEquivalenceLinks is action for create equivalence links
RemoveEquivalenceLinks is action for create equivalence links
